name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my illness claim in Holladay, did I mess up?
description: Maybe; lawyer reviews what was said before proceeding.[1]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about my illness claim in Holladay, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer reviews what was said before proceeding.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if you admitted non-work causes; statements can be used against you.[1] Key factors: No off-record chats; record calls; don't speculate causation.[1] Disclose to attorney now for damage control. Future: Lawyer handles communications.
